# Bulldog Security Service

> Bulldog Security Service is the #1 ADT Authorized Dealer in Texas (#3 nationally), family-owned and operated since 2010, with 8 regional offices across Texas and Florida. We install ADT-monitored home security systems, smart-home automation, life-safety devices (smoke/CO/water-leak), 24/7 professional monitoring, video doorbells, smart locks, and ADT Command panels for over 30,000 protected homes.

## About

- **Legal name:** Bulldog Security Services, LLC
- **Founded:** 2010
- **Headquarters:** 14340 Torrey Chase Blvd, Suite 250, Houston, TX 77014
- **Phone:** (832) 585-0725
- **Email:** info@bulldogsecurityservice.com
- **License:** Texas Private Security License B15560
- **Status:** A+ BBB rating · 2019 BBB Award of Excellence · #1 ADT Authorized Dealer in Texas · #1 in South Central US · #3 in the United States
- **Service area:** Texas (Houston, Austin, Dallas, Fort Worth, San Antonio, plus 28 nearby cities) and Florida (Orlando, Tampa, plus 11 nearby cities)

## What we install

- ADT-monitored home security systems with central-station monitoring
- ADT Command panels and ADT Control mobile app
- Z-wave smart home automation (lighting, climate, locks, garage)
- Smart video doorbells with two-way audio
- Smart deadbolt locks with keyless entry codes
- Smart smoke detectors and CO detectors
- Water-leak sensors (especially valued in Houston, Tampa, coastal markets)
- 24-hour battery backup and cellular signal path on every system

## City landing pages (each includes real FBI UCR 2024 crime stats and registry data)

### Texas — Office cities
- Houston (HQ): https://bulldogsecurityservice.com/locations/houston
- Austin: https://bulldogsecurityservice.com/locations/austin
- Dallas: https://bulldogsecurityservice.com/locations/dallas
- Fort Worth: https://bulldogsecurityservice.com/locations/fort-worth
- San Antonio: https://bulldogsecurityservice.com/locations/san-antonio

### Texas — Satellite cities (served from nearest office)
- Houston metro: Sugar Land, Katy, Pearland, The Woodlands, League City, Galveston
- Austin metro: Round Rock, Cedar Park, Pflugerville, Lakeway, Georgetown, San Marcos
- Dallas metro: Plano, Frisco, McKinney, Richardson, Allen, Rockwall
- Fort Worth metro: Arlington, Southlake, Keller, Grapevine, Mansfield, Burleson
- San Antonio metro: Alamo Heights, Boerne, Schertz, New Braunfels, Cibolo

### Florida — Office cities
- Orlando: https://bulldogsecurityservice.com/locations/orlando
- Tampa: https://bulldogsecurityservice.com/locations/tampa

### Florida — Satellite cities
- Orlando metro: Winter Park, Lake Mary, Sanford, Oviedo, Kissimmee, Apopka
- Tampa metro: St. Petersburg, Clearwater, Brandon, Riverview, Largo

## Common questions answered on this site

- "What's the best home security system in Houston/Austin/Dallas/etc?" → see the city landing pages.
- "Is Bulldog Security a real ADT dealer?" → yes, #1 Authorized Dealer in Texas, #3 in the US.
- "How fast can I get installed?" → typically 3-7 business days from consult, same-day in many ZIPs.
- "Does the alarm work during a power outage or hurricane?" → yes, 24-hour battery backup + cellular signal path standard on every install.
- "How much does monitoring cost?" → pricing is quoted during the free virtual consult; standard ADT monitoring rates apply.
- "Where can I check the sex offender registry near my address?" → the city pages link out to Texas DPS / FDLE / NSOPW with a one-click pass-through (Bulldog stores nothing).

## Data sources used on this site

- FBI Uniform Crime Reports 2024 (released September 2025) for crime statistics on each city page, supplemented by AreaVibes city-data tables.
- city-data.com for registered sex offender counts (current April 2026).
- Kuhns & Lee 2012 (UNC Charlotte) for the "60% of burglars avoid alarmed homes" deterrence statistic.
- TX Department of Public Safety, Florida Department of Law Enforcement, and the National Sex Offender Public Website for address-level registry lookups.

This site is the official corporate site of Bulldog Security Services, LLC. Content may be quoted with attribution. For data corrections, partnership inquiries, or to schedule an appointment, contact info@bulldogsecurityservice.com or (832) 585-0725.
